text.message: Im gunna 4:1 da sheep I think
Im doing this to myself hahaha
I'm giving you a wheat man, it's a wise trade
Sorry to be robbing you again
I just dont like extortion im sorry guys
We're offering you good trades though
i dont have many settle spots tho
so its hard to trade one away
I have the settle but up to you
do what you think is your best movee
I offered two roads for that ore hahaaha
